name: Ipswich Country Club
about: Ipswich Country Club is a premier country club located in New England, featuring an 18-hole Robert Trent Jones Sr. championship golf course alongside a variety of amenities. The club offers tennis and pickleball courts, a swimming pool, a state-of-the-art fitness center, and multiple dining options, making it suitable for families, social events, and serious golfers alike. Membership provides full access to these facilities, with different tiers available depending on the level of access desired.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a championship 18-hole Robert Trent Jones Sr. golf course
State-of-the-art fitness center to support on and off-course goals
Full family membership access including tennis, swimming, and dining

food_and_drink.notes: Clubhouse dining available for various occasions
Full bar service available with a cabana poolside

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs to play golf?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to provide their own clubs. Golf cart rental fees are not included with membership.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The club offers full dining and bar services for members and their guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on course conditions and pace of play. The course is championship-quality and well-maintained.

faq.question: Is the club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ipswich Country Club is very family-friendly with youth golf programs, family memberships, and amenities for all ages.
